elements.author: g2g
elements.caps: RawVideo { format: Rgba8, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }
elements.description: Generates a synthetic test pattern (SMPTE bars, snow, moving bar, ball, ...)
elements.name: videotestsrc

properties.enum_values: gradient | snow | bar | smpte | checkers-8 | ball | zone-plate
properties.name: pattern

properties.blurb: frames to emit then EOS (-1 = forever)
properties.name: num-buffers

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Generates a synthetic audio test tone
elements.name: audiotestsrc

properties.blurb: buffers to emit then EOS (-1 = forever)
properties.name: num-buffers

properties.blurb: waveform: sine | square | saw | triangle | white-noise | silence
properties.name: wave

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Reads a local file as a byte stream
elements.name: filesrc

properties.blurb: container of a raw byte stream: mpegts | matroska | ogg | flv | auto (sniff the header)
properties.name: bytestream-format

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Reads a SubRip / WebVTT / SSA / TTML file as a Text stream
elements.name: subtitlesrc

properties.blurb: text format: srt | vtt | ssa | ttml (else sniffed from the extension)
properties.name: format

elements.author: g2g
elements.caps: CompressedVideo { codec: Mjpeg, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }
elements.description: Reads a sequence of files
elements.name: multifilesrc

properties.blurb: last index (-1 = until a file is missing)
properties.name: stop-index

properties.blurb: restart the sequence at the end
properties.name: loop

elements.author: g2g
elements.caps: RawVideo { format: Rgba8, width: Fixed(320), height: Fixed(240), framerate: Fixed(1966080) }
elements.description: Emits buffers the application pushes in via register_appsrc / g2g_appsrc_push
elements.name: appsrc

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Converts between raw video pixel formats (RGBA, BGRA, NV12, I420)

SRC: [RawVideo { format: Rgba8, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: Bgra8, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: Nv12, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: I420, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: I420p10, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: I420p12, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: I422, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: I422p10, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: I422p12, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: I444, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: I444p10, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: I444p12, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }]

properties.blurb: output pixel format: NV12 | I420 | RGBA | BGRA | YUY2
properties.name: format

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Quantizes/dequantizes f32 <-> int8/uint8, narrows/widens f32 <-> f16, transposes NCHW <-> NHWC
elements.name: tensorconvert

properties.blurb: output dtype: f32 | f16 | i8 | u8 (int target = quantize, f16 = narrow, f32 = dequantize/widen)
properties.name: dtype

properties.blurb: output layout: nchw | nhwc (transpose a 4D tensor)
properties.name: layout

SRC: [RawVideo { format: Rgba8, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: Bgra8, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }]

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Overlays the buffer time on video

SRC: [RawVideo { format: Rgba8, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, RawVideo { format: Bgra8, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }]

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Renders SRT / WebVTT subtitle cues over video by PTS
elements.name: textoverlay
pads: SINK: [RawVideo { format: Rgba8, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }]
SRC: [RawVideo { format: Rgba8, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }]

properties.blurb: path to an SRT (.srt) or WebVTT (.vtt) subtitle file; cues render by PTS
properties.name: location

properties.blurb: path to a .ttf / .ttc font for glyph rendering (truetype-overlay); needed for CJK / accented text. Without it the 8x8 ASCII bitmap is used
properties.name: font

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Parses a SubRip / WebVTT document into timed UTF-8 text cues
elements.name: subparse
pads: SINK: [Text { format: Srt }, Text { format: WebVtt }, Text { format: Ssa }, Text { format: Ttml }]
SRC: [Text { format: Utf8 }]

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Extracts CEA-608 / CEA-708 captions from H.264 / H.265 SEI into timed UTF-8 text cues
elements.name: ccextract
pads: SINK: [CompressedVideo { codec: H264, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, CompressedVideo { codec: H265, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }]
SRC: [Text { format: Utf8 }]

SRC: [Audio { format: PcmS16Le, channels: 2, sample_rate: 48000 }]

elements.description: Amplifies an audio stream

SRC: [Audio { format: PcmS16Le, channels: 2, sample_rate: 48000 }]

SRC: [Audio { format: PcmS16Le, channels: 2, sample_rate: 48000 }]

properties.blurb: measure and expose levels when true

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Detects silence in an audio stream
elements.name: cutter
pads: SINK: [Audio { format: PcmS16Le, channels: 2, sample_rate: 48000 }]
SRC: [Audio { format: PcmS16Le, channels: 2, sample_rate: 48000 }]

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Three-band audio equalizer
elements.name: equalizer-3bands

SRC: [Audio { format: PcmS16Le, channels: 2, sample_rate: 48000 }]

properties.blurb: low band (100 Hz) gain in dB

properties.blurb: mid band (1 kHz) gain in dB
properties.name: band1

properties.blurb: high band (10 kHz) gain in dB
properties.name: band2

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: FFT spectrum analyzer
elements.name: spectrum
pads: SINK: [Audio { format: PcmS16Le, channels: 2, sample_rate: 48000 }]
SRC: [Audio { format: PcmS16Le, channels: 2, sample_rate: 48000 }]

elements.name: tsdemux
pads: SINK: [ByteStream { encoding: MpegTs }]

elements.name: matroskademux
pads: SINK: [ByteStream { encoding: Matroska }]

SRC: [CompressedVideo { codec: H264, width: Range { min: 16, max: 65535 }, height: Range { min: 16, max: 65535 }, framerate: Range { min_q16: 65536, max_q16: 15728640 } }, CompressedVideo { codec: H265, width: Range { min: 16, max: 65535 }, height: Range { min: 16, max: 65535 }, framerate: Range { min_q16: 65536, max_q16: 15728640 } }, CompressedVideo { codec: Vp8, width: Range { min: 16, max: 65535 }, height: Range { min: 16, max: 65535 }, framerate: Range { min_q16: 65536, max_q16: 15728640 } }, CompressedVideo { codec: Vp9, width: Range { min: 16, max: 65535 }, height: Range { min: 16, max: 65535 }, framerate: Range { min_q16: 65536, max_q16: 15728640 } }, CompressedVideo { codec: Av1, width: Range { min: 16, max: 65535 }, height: Range { min: 16, max: 65535 }, framerate: Range { min_q16: 65536, max_q16: 15728640 } }, Audio { format: Aac, channels: 0, sample_rate: 0 }, Audio { format: Opus, channels: 0, sample_rate: 0 }, Text { format: Utf8 }]

properties.blurb: elementary stream to emit: h264 | h265 | vp8 | vp9 | av1 | aac | opus
properties.name: stream

elements.name: mpegtsmux
pads: SINK: [CompressedVideo { codec: H264, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, CompressedVideo { codec: H265, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, Audio { format: Aac, channels: 0, sample_rate: 0 }]
SRC: [ByteStream { encoding: MpegTs }]

properties.blurb: alias of pat-interval (the tables are emitted together)

elements.name: matroskamux
pads: SINK: [CompressedVideo { codec: H264, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, CompressedVideo { codec: H265, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, CompressedVideo { codec: Vp8, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, CompressedVideo { codec: Vp9, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, CompressedVideo { codec: Av1, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, Audio { format: Aac, channels: 0, sample_rate: 0 }, Audio { format: Opus, channels: 0, sample_rate: 0 }]

SRC: [ByteStream { encoding: IsoBmff }]

properties.blurb: target fragment duration, milliseconds (0 = one fragment per access unit)

elements.name: oggdemux
pads: SINK: [ByteStream { encoding: Ogg }]
SRC: [Audio { format: Opus, channels: 0, sample_rate: 0 }]

elements.description: Demuxes a fragmented-MP4 / CMAF byte stream
elements.name: fmp4demux

properties.blurb: elementary stream to emit: h264 | aac

elements.name: flvmux

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Parses an H.264 Annex-B stream and refines caps from SPS/PPS

SRC: [CompressedVideo { codec: H264, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }]

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Parses an H.265 Annex-B stream and refines caps from VPS/SPS/PPS

properties.blurb: VPS/SPS/PPS re-insertion interval in seconds (0 = off, -1 = every IRAP, N = every N s)
properties.name: config-interval

elements.name: aacparse

SRC: [Audio { format: Aac, channels: 2, sample_rate: 48000 }]

SRC: [CompressedVideo { codec: Av1, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }]

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Periodically reports pipeline progress
elements.name: progressreport

properties.blurb: report interval in seconds of stream time
properties.name: update-freq

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Shifts frame PTS/DTS by a signed offset (the av-offset A/V sync knob)

properties.name: offset

properties.blurb: caps to filter to, gst-launch syntax: e.g. video/x-raw,format=nv12,width=320,height=240
properties.name: caps

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Discards all buffers (a no-op terminal for testing)
elements.name: fakesink
pads: SINK: ANY

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Delivers buffers to the application via callback or pull (g2g_appsink_*)
elements.name: appsink
pads: SINK: ANY

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Writes incoming buffers to a local file
elements.name: filesink
pads: SINK: ANY

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Writes buffers to a sequence of files
elements.name: multifilesink
pads: SINK: ANY

properties.blurb: max bytes per file in max-size mode
properties.name: max-file-size

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Muxes to a series of MP4 files
elements.name: splitmuxsink
pads: SINK: [CompressedVideo { codec: H264, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }, CompressedVideo { codec: H265, width: Any, height: Any, framerate: Any }]

properties.blurb: max segment duration in ns (0 = no split)
properties.name: max-size-time

properties.blurb: max segment size in bytes (0 = no split)
properties.name: max-size-bytes

elements.author: g2g
elements.caps: RawVideo { format: Rgba8, width: Fixed(320), height: Fixed(240), framerate: Fixed(1966080) }
elements.description: Interleaves N input streams into one output by presentation timestamp; the structural fan-in for text/data streams (the gst `funnel` analog).
elements.name: funnel

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Concatenates N streams end to end
elements.name: concat

properties.blurb: offset each input onto a continuous timeline
properties.name: adjust-base

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Forwards one of N inputs
elements.name: input-selector

properties.blurb: index of the input to forward
properties.name: active-pad

elements.author: g2g
elements.description: Sums N time-aligned PCM audio inputs into one output stream (the gst `audiomixer` analog).
elements.name: audiomixer
